CREATE TABLE test_map (key String, value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * 10), map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2)) AS result;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v + 1), map('key1', 5, 'key2', 10, 'key3', 15)) AS result;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * v), map('key1', 2, 'key2', 3)) AS result;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v / 2), map('key1', 10, 'key2', 20)) AS result;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * 3), map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2, 'key3', 3)) AS results FROM (SELECT map('key1', value, 'key2', value * 2) AS map_values FROM test_map);
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v + 5), _map) AS result FROM (SELECT map('key1', value, 'key2', value + 3) AS _map FROM test_map WHERE value > 1);
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v - 1), map('key1', 100, 'key2', 200, 'key3', 300)) AS result UNION ALL SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * 2), map('key1', 10, 'key2', 20));
CREATE TABLE map_test AS SELECT map('keyA', 4, 'keyB', 8) AS original_map;
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v + 100), original_map) AS updated_map FROM map_test;
